TimelineObjectDefinition.definition: {"timeline":{"anchorObject":{"object":{"entity":"Account","label":"Account","source":"","icon":""}},"age":{"field":""},"events":[{"oneToMany":{"eventObject":{"name":"CareProgramEnrollee","label":"Care Program Enrollee","recordTypes":[],"fieldsToDisplay":[{"field":"AccountId","label":"Account ID","type":"EntityId"},{"field":"UserId","label":"User ID","type":"EntityId"},{"field":"CareProgramId","label":"Care Program ID","type":"EntityId"},{"field":"Id","label":"Care Program Enrollee ID","type":"EntityId"}],"relatedlistsToDisplay":[{"entity":"AuthorizationFormConsents","label":"Authorization Form Consents"},{"entity":"Care_Program_Enrollee_Products","label":"Care Program Enrollee Products"},{"entity":"Care_Program_Enrollment_Cards","label":"Care Program Enrollment Cards"},{"entity":"DocumentChecklistItemPR","label":"Document Checklist Items"},{"entity":"CombinedAttachments","label":"Notes & Attachments"}],"title":{"field":"Name","label":"Name","type":"Text"},"subTitle":{"field":"Status","label":"Status","type":"DynamicEnum"},"allowNew":true,"useObjectNameAsTitle":false,"includeFieldNameInSubtitle":false},"filters":[],"sort":{"field":"CreatedDate","label":"Created Date","type":"DateTime"},"anchorReferenceField":{"field":"AccountId","label":"Account ID","type":"EntityId"}}},{},{},{}]}}
